title: Secretary Spec — Streak Tracker
views_and_gestures: Streaks strip on topbar or morning-grid card, live display for streak_worthy anchors
'Honor this anchor' gesture available on any commit
nightly_job: walks the day's residue (TCL entry) and updates each streak_worthy anchor as honored or broken

upstream: north_star.json anchors declared with streak_worthy flag

why_it_matters: Makes the North Star Ledger operational instead of aspirational. Declared anchors without a fidelity tracker are a list. Declared anchors with a streak are a system.
open_questions: streak_worthy flag location: on the anchor itself in north_star.json, or in a separate config?
Break semantics: partial honor counts as a break? break_reason free-text or enum?
'Honor this anchor' UI: button, multi-select dropdown, or inferred from commit cross-refs?
Nightly trigger: fixed time vs. Jake-signaled end-of-day?
Grace windows per anchor — risk of turning fidelity meter back into gamification
